notes: The Magician's six-face arcana die. Same structure as the Fool's; the WILD face resolves on whether the Magician has Inspiration banked instead of Faith adjacent.

faces.description: Success ★★. The thing you reached for is the thing your hand built.
Success ★. Three lines down, then the room exhales.
Partial. Spend 1 Inspiration to convert to ★.
Partial. Spend 1 Inspiration to convert to ★.
Failure. A draft burned itself before you decided. +1 Inspiration.
Wild. Counts as ★ if you have at least 1 Inspiration banked; counts as failure otherwise.
